title: Raspberry Revel
description: A light and sour Moroccan dish featuring raspberry jam with a sugar-free twist, slow-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Combine raspberry jam, almond meal, and a pinch of vanilla bean paste in a small saucepan.
Stir well until all the ingredients are evenly distributed and there are no lumps. The mixture should be thick and creamy.
Transfer the mixture to an ovenproof dish and bake for 20-25 minutes or until it turns into a soft, creamy texture.
Let the Raspberry Revel cool before serving.
Serve warm with whipped cream or coconut milk as desired.
